global.description: The ad features a bright yellow background with a logo, icons, and text promoting a food service.
global.main_message: Promoting quick food options with a discount offer.

elements.label: Yellow background
elements.description: A solid yellow background that fills the entire ad space.

elements.label: QuickFork logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'QuickFork' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Food icon
elements.description: Two stylized food containers represented as simple outlines, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Food icon
elements.description: Another stylized food container icon, also represented as a simple outline, positioned near the first icon.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: Text that reads 'Fast food, fast Fresh favorites nearby' in a large, bold font, centered in the ad.
elements.text_content: Fast food, fast Fresh favorites nearby

elements.label: 30% discount badge
elements.description: A small badge displaying '-30%' in a bold font, located at the bottom left of the ad.

elements.label: Book now button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Book now' in a bold font, located at the bottom center of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and cheerful, QuickFork logo, food icons, discount offer
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by icons in the center, main message in the middle, and CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: QuickFork, Fast food, fast Fresh favorites nearby, Book now, -30%
